message:
fix(select): poll all futures for cancel-correctness

Critical fix for SelectAll combinator to ensure loser draining works:
- Poll ALL futures on each iteration, not just until first ready
- This ensures JoinFutures are created (via first poll) before SelectAll drops
- Without this, losers' JoinFutures were never created, so their Drop impl
  couldn't abort tasks, causing task leaks that violated the cancel invariant

Also updates .beads/issues.jsonl with task progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
